description: The image displays two company logos positioned side-by-side on a white background. The first logo, on the left, is "NORCE" in dark blue capital letters. The letter 'O' in NORCE is replaced by a light blue circular graphic resembling a sun or starburst, consisting of a central circle surrounded by radiating dots. The second logo, on the right, is "GAFAG" in capital letters. The letters "GAF" are dark grey, and the letters "AG" are red. Below the "GAFAG" logo, in smaller grey text, is the tagline "an e-GEOS (ASI / Telespazio) Company".
